problem id: c424dcd4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  01110000 -> 11100111
  11011000 -> 11001101
  00010001 -> 00111011
  01100000 -> 11100111
  01010101 -> 00101111
  11101111 -> 10001110
  00101000 -> 11110111
  00101001 -> 00110111

query: 11110000
predicted answer: 11001111
